content:
🚨 Hiring Alert - 2 Full-time Remote Roles | Work From Anywhere | Immediate Joining

We're hiring trainers to create and deliver content for our live events and webinars across multiple verticals - U.S. Accounting, Business Automation, and others.

This is for brilliant communicators, creators, and teachers who want a meaningful career from home - owning a meaningful process end-to-end, from high-level planning to ground-level execution.

💡 WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR
We're neutral on prior work experience. What matters is your ability to communicate, create, and teach. Subject matter expertise is welcome but not mandatory - you'll learn on the job. 
For most candidates, prior experience (if any) is not relevant or sufficient, our most successful hires only grow with your curiosity and desire to contribute. 

You are likely to do well if you have : 
• Built your own social media following or personal brand (even if at a small level) 
• Created reels or video content for your personal accounts 
• Worked as a coach, trainer, or mentor 
• Done public speaking, debates, acting, or theatre 
• Performed or facilitated in any setting that required holding an audience 
Above all, high curiosity, insatiable hunger for knowledge, and a desire to contribute. 

🏡 WHO THIS IS REALLY FOR
We're looking for people who feel they don't fit the traditional workspace environment.

If the 9-to-5 office culture was never built for you, and you believe your talents could be better utilised by contributing to others, this role is for you.
We want the misfits, the creators, the unconventional thinkers who do their best work on their own terms.

✨ WHAT YOU MUST BRING
- A genuine love for contributing, teaching, creativity, and innovation
- Willingness to constantly learn - the AI ecosystem is changing every single month
- Ability to simplify complex ideas through storytelling in easy language
- Aptitude for problem-solving and persistence

🎯 YOU SHOULD APPLY IF
• Your creative talents are going unnoticed and you want thousands to learn from your content 
• You pride yourself on simplifying things and educating others 
• You want meaningful work from home, with priority for your family and well-being 
• You want stability and security in your earnings - not the uncertainty of freelancing

💰 COMPENSATION
• Base: ₹40,000/month + up to ₹25,000 in performance incentives 
• Stable, salaried role - not freelance

📋 THE LOGISTICS
• 100% Work From Home, Forever 
• Honest 8 hours of work every day is essential 
• Own laptop/device and a stable internet connection required

🎯 HIRING PROCESS
Shortlisted candidates will get a trial task to assess your teaching capability and ability to connect with an audience.

If you’re interested, please comment below and we'll get in touch. 
Feel free to tag any of your friends who may be interested or suited for the role.
